full_text:
Xu Ci (Rendu) 許慈 (仁篤)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Ci (許慈), styledRendu (仁篤), was born in Nanyang commandery. Expert in teachings of Zheng Xuan. Argued with Hu Qian. Xu Ci was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.
